title: Chapter 25
content:
Chapter 25: Chapter 25: Lust Points Overflow

A flurry of notifications reached Damon, and when he opened his eyes.

[You took away the anal chastity of a noble woman, +2500 lust points]

[You took away the anal chastity of a noble woman that love you, +10000 lust points]

[You made a woman that have higher cultivation than you masturbate, +3000 lust points]

[You made a woman that have higher cultivation than you masturbate, +3000 lust points]

[You made a woman that have higher cultivation than you, climax, +5000 lust points]

[You made a woman that have higher cultivation than you, climax, +5000 lust points]

[You cum inside a woman’s womb that loves you multiple times, +2000 lust points]

[You cum inside a woman’s ass that loves you multiple times, +2000 lust points]

[...]

...

...

...

Looking at his status window, a smile spread from one side of his face to the other.

[Name: Damon Arcknight]

[Age: 18]

[Cultivation: Elementary Spirit Realm - Eight Level] [Can advance with lust point]

[Affinities: Fire: 40, Water: 40, Ice: 40, Wind: 40, Lightning: 40, Earth: 40, Nature: 40, Light: 40, Dark: 40, Sword: 50] [Can be upgraded with the lust point]

[Spiritual Roots: Elemental Spiritual Roots] [Mortal Grade - Peak] [Can be upgraded with the lust point, and new roots can be bought in the lust store]

[Bloodline: Blood of Incubus Lord] [Mortal Grade - Mid] [Can be upgraded with lust point]

[Physique: Body of Incubus Lord] [Mortal Grade - Mid] [Can be upgraded with lust point]

[Lust points: 123,760]

[Harem Members: Ariel Aquaria]

[Ability: Incubus Touch, Incubus Aura, Incubus Eyes]

123,760 points, those were the points gained from the mission and an intense sex with Ariel. But not only that, it looks like those girls masturbate while watching him and Ariel have sex.

He looked down and found Ariel sleeping on his chest while still naked and covered in his sperm. He decided to let her sleep, then he spread his senses to his bedroom and found it empty. The twin has already left.

’Well, they will come and find me sooner or later.’

After that, Damon got up and slowly carried Ariel to the bedroom and put her in his still damp bed from Mio’s and Mia’s love juice.

He walks toward the bath and cleans himself.

****

Damon was naked in a large steaming bathtub in the bathroom. He was scrolling through the lust store.

’For now, increasing my cultivation too fast will cause some problems with my foundation, so I should wait a few days before raising my cultivation.’

’There is also that useless man to take care of. Hmm... using my sword intent should be enough, it should also attract the sect. Since the sect leader already has eyes on me, I’m sure they will take care of the Frostborn family even if I kill Jack. He is thinking inside his mind.’

"For now, let’s see what I can do with this point," he muttered to himself.

"System, how many points to upgrade my spiritual root to earth grade?"

[I will cost you 5000 points, host.]

"Why is it so expensive compared to when I upgrade to peak level?"

[Every grade upgrade is different from a level upgrade, it will cost you more, and the same with bloodline, physique, and cultivation.]

"I see... then for now upgrade my bloodline and physique to peak level and upgrade my spirit root to earth grade peak."

[Upgrading Spiritual Roots...]

[Spiritual Roots upgraded! Elemental Spiritual Roots, Mortal Grade - Peak → Elemental Spiritual Roots, Earth Grade - Low. -5000 lust points.]

[Spiritual Roots upgraded! Elemental Spiritual Roots, Earth Grade - Low → Elemental Spiritual Roots, Earth Grade - Peak. -15000 lust points.]

[Your affinity with Fire, Water, Ice, Wind, Lightning, Earth, Nature, Light, and Dark has increased by 20.]

[Bloodline upgraded! Blood of Incubus Lord Mortal Grade - Mid → Blood of Incubus Lord Mortal Grade - Peak. -3000 lust points.]

[Physique upgraded! Body of Incubus Lord Mortal Grade - Mid → Body of Incubus Lord Mortal Grade - Peak. -3000 lust points.]

[Caution, Incubus Lord will awaken once it reaches earth grade.]

"Huh...? What do you mean?"

[Up until now, hosts just use the sleeping power of Incubus Lord, that’s why Incubus Touch, Aura, and Eyes effect are really small.]

"Now you think about it, you’re right. Aura only makes the girls attach to me, not make them mesmerize instantly, and the other effects seem a little weak."

[Yes, Host, once it awakens, it will amplify the abilities you have and also raise your lust; if not, control your lust will take over your body.]

"So, I can become a mindless beast of lust that will attack and rape any woman?"

[Yes, that’s the extreme case, but you don’t worry too much as long as your cultivation is high enough, the cultivation will suppress the effect, and the higher the grade of Incubus lord, the more benefits there will be.]

"Ohh, I see you got me worried there for a second, and what benefits?"

[Your sperm will taste good for women and make them addicted to it, also it will keep their lust at peak, it will also increase the potency of your yang qi in your sperm, even absorbing yin qi in the area automatically. At the current condition, you can even make a mortal that can’t cultivate become a cultivator.]

"What? That’s crazy... " he said about it, then went silent for a few minutes, putting the new information about his Incubus Lord.

"Haah... I should keep this a secret; if someone finds out, they will make me a cultivator maker elixir."

"Anyway, system, with the current amount of yang qi inside Ariel, will it make her jump multiple stages like before?"

[No host, the effect before was because of the host’s virginity. In effect, with the current amount, it will be just enough for her to reach the ninth stage of the Elementary Spirit Realm if she cultivates with it for a few days, but not enough to make her breakthrough to the True Spirit Realm.]

"I see..." Then he opened up his new status.

[Name: Damon Arcknight]

[Age: 18]

[Cultivation: Elementary Spirit Realm - Eight Level] [Can advance with lust point]

[Affinities: Fire: 60, Water: 60, Ice: 60, Wind: 60, Lightning: 60, Earth: 60, Nature: 60, Light: 60, Dark: 60, Sword: 50] [Can be upgraded with the lust point]

[Spiritual Roots: Elemental Spiritual Roots] [Earth Grade - Peak] [Can be upgraded with the lust point, and new roots can be bought in the lust store]

[Bloodline: Blood of Incubus Lord] [Mortal Grade - Peak] [Can be upgraded with lust point]

[Physique: Body of Incubus Lord] [Mortal Grade - Peak] [Can be upgraded with lust point]

[Lust points: 97,760]

[Harem Members: Ariel Aquaria]

[Ability: Incubus Touch, Incubus Aura, Incubus Eyes]

Suddenly, the bathroom door opened, and Ariel appeared with her naked body.
